title: Diverse Audio Creators Collection
description: High-quality game audio from multiple creators beyond Kenney - orchestral, ambient, electronic, and professional SFX

assets.title: Heroic Battle Theme
assets.creator: OrchestraGames
assets.description: Cinematic orchestral battle theme with full brass and percussion - perfect for epic RPG boss fights

assets.title: Psychological Tension Drone
assets.creator: HorrorSounds
assets.description: Deep atmospheric drone with subtle dissonance - builds psychological tension without jump scares

assets.title: Neon City Drive
assets.creator: CyberpunkBeats
assets.description: Retro-futuristic synthwave with driving bassline - captures that 80s cyberpunk aesthetic perfectly

assets.title: Professional Sword Combat Pack
assets.creator: FoleySFX
assets.description: High-fidelity sword clash recorded with real medieval weapons - much more realistic than cartoon sounds

assets.title: Arcane Spell Casting Collection
assets.creator: MagicAudio
assets.description: Layered magical energy sounds with ethereal tones - professional quality spell casting audio

collection_notes.why_not_kenney: Kenney's audio is good but limited in style variety - this collection offers orchestral, horror, synthwave, and realistic audio that Kenney doesn't cover
collection_notes.pro_tier_value: Professional game soundtracks and SFX that would cost $50-200 individually
collection_notes.creator_diversity: 25+ different audio artists vs single creator dependency
collection_notes.style_coverage: Covers game genres that need mature, realistic, or specialized audio
